hero.title: Small Tools. Supercharged Workflows.
hero.subtitle: A collection of lightweight, privacy-focused extensions built for the modern power user.

pricing.title: Completely Free
pricing.description: No hidden costs, no premium tiers, no subscriptions.

about.subtitle: Building tools that make your workflow better, one extension at a time.
about.bio: I'm a passionate developer who builds browser extensions and web tools that enhance productivity and solve real-world problems. I believe in creating simple, efficient solutions that prioritize user privacy and performance.
about.studioP1: Product Index is a collection of thoughtfully crafted browser extensions designed for developers, creators, and power users. We believe in building small tools that make a big impact on your daily workflow.
about.studioP2: Our extensions prioritize privacy, performance, and developer experience. Each tool is built with attention to detail and a focus on solving real problems.

productDetail.notFoundDesc: The extension you're looking for doesn't exist.
productDetail.noReviews: No reviews yet. Be the first to review!

reviews.emptyRegistry: Reviews will appear here once you add them to the reviews registry.

promptNav.title: Easy prompt navigation
promptNav.description: See all prompts in one list. Click any prompt to jump to that part of the chat. No more endless scrolling through long conversations.

promptNav.title: Export full conversations
promptNav.description: Download complete chats in PDF, Markdown, JSON, HTML, or plain text. Useful for notes, documentation, research, and sharing.

promptNav.title: Works with multiple AI tools
promptNav.description: Compatible with ChatGPT, Gemini, and Claude. One extension for all your AI conversations.

promptNav.title: Simple and lightweight
promptNav.description: Easy to use with no setup required. Clean and fast interface that doesn't slow down your browser.

promptNav.title: For everyone
promptNav.description: Perfect for developers, writers, researchers, students, and anyone who uses long AI chats. Find information faster and keep context.

promptNav.title: No account required
promptNav.description: No sign-up or account needed. Everything happens locally in your browser. Your data stays private and secure.

prompt-nav.name: ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude Chat Export & Navigator
prompt-nav.description: Download and export ChatGPT, Gemini, and Claude conversations in PDF, Markdown, JSON, HTML, or text, plus smart prompt navigation.

gpt-gif.name: GPT Gifs
gpt-gif.description: A fun Chrome extension that shows selected GIFs on ChatGPT, Gemini, and Claude search boxes.
